meta.name: Radtel RT-4D
meta.brief: Corresponds to CPS version 2.07.

meta.name: First Settings Block
meta.brief: Corresponds to the segment index 0.

meta.name: Key Lock Delay
meta.brief: Weird implementation of an alomst regular time specification. Continues to 600s in 15s steps. 0=Off.

meta.name: Display Shut-off Delay
meta.brief: Weird implementation of an alomst regular time specification. Continues to 600s in 15s steps. 0=Off.

meta.name: Power Save Delay
meta.brief: Specifies the delay in seconds.

meta.name: Menu Exit Delay
meta.brief: Weird implementation of an alomst regular time specification. Continues to 600s in 15s steps. 0=Off.

meta.name: Auto-Shutdown Delay
meta.brief: Specifies the time-out in seconds.

meta.name: TX Priority
meta.brief: WTF?

meta.name: Lock Type
meta.brief: Specifies the possible locking type for the frequency range.

meta.name: Lower Frequency
meta.brief: Specifies the lower bound of the frequency range in MHz.

meta.name: Upper Frequency
meta.brief: Specifies the upper frequency bound in MHz.

meta.name: Scan Mode
meta.brief: Specifies the action taken, when a signal is found during scan.
meta.description: If Carrier, the scan halts as long as there is a carrier prenset and continues afterwards. If Time is set, the scan stops for a specified duration. If Stop is set, the scan stops and does not resume.

meta.name: Scan Return Channel
meta.brief: Specifies the channel to switch to, after a scan ended.

meta.name: Scan Dwell Time
meta.brief: Specifies the dwell time in seconds.

meta.name: Scan Interval Duration
meta.brief: Specifies the duration in seconds.

meta.name: RSSI Update Period
meta.brief: Specifies the update period in multiples of 100ms. 0=Off.

meta.name: Frequency Precision
meta.brief: Specifies the number of digits for frequencies.

meta.name: TBST Frequency
meta.brief: Specifies the frequency in Hz.

meta.name: Frequency Detect Range
meta.brief: WTF?

meta.name: Repeat Detect Delay
meta.brief: Specifies the delay in multiples of 100ms.

meta.name: FM Glitch Threshold
meta.brief: WTF?

meta.name: TBST Duration
meta.brief: Specifies the TBST duration in seconds.

meta.name: Radio DMR ID
meta.brief: Specifies the DMR ID in little endian 8-digit BCD.

meta.name: Group Call Hang Time
meta.brief: Specified in ms.

meta.name: Private Call Hang Time
meta.brief: Specified in ms.

meta.name: DTMF transmit delay
meta.brief: Specified in multiples of 100ms.

meta.name: DTMF tone duration
meta.brief: Specified as 30ms + n*10ms.

meta.name: DTMF Interval
meta.brief: Specified as 30ms + n*10ms.

meta.name: DTMF transmission mode
meta.brief: Specifies when to transmit DTMF code.

meta.name: DTMF code index
meta.brief: Index is specified without any offset.

meta.name: Code
meta.brief: Just an ASCII string of 0-9, A-D, * and #.

meta.name: Code
meta.brief: Just an ASCII string of 0-9, A-D, * and #.

meta.name: Code
meta.brief: Just an ASCII string of 0-9, A-D, * and #.

meta.name: Code
meta.brief: Just an ASCII string of 0-9, A-D, * and #.

meta.name: Code
meta.brief: Just an ASCII string of 0-9, A-D, * and #.

meta.name: Lower Scan Frequency
meta.brief: Specifies the lower boundary of the scan frequency range.
meta.description: The frequency is specified in multiples of 10Hz.

meta.name: Upper Scan Frequency
meta.brief: Specifies the upper bound of the scan frequency range.
meta.description: The frequency is specified in multiples of 10Hz.

meta.name: Channel Bank
meta.brief: Corresponds to the segment index 1.

meta.name: RX/TX
meta.brief: Selects if RX and/or TX is allowed.

meta.name: FM scrabler index
meta.brief: Specifies the index +1. If set to 0, no scrabler is selected.

meta.name: Power
meta.brief: Specifies the transmit power.

meta.name: Analog Demodulation
meta.brief: For analog channels, specifies the demodulation.

meta.name: RX Frequency
meta.brief: Specifies in multiples of 10Hz.

meta.name: TX Frequency
meta.brief: Specifies in multiples of 10Hz.

meta.name: RX Tone
meta.brief: If 0, no RX tone is selected.
meta.description: The encoding is complex: The most significant nibble encodes the type 1=CTCSS, 2=DCS normal, 3=DCS inverted The remaining least significant 12bit encode the frequency in 0.1Hz or the DCS code in binary.

meta.name: TX Tone
meta.brief: If 0, no TX tone is selected.
meta.description: The encoding is complex: The most significant nibble encodes the type 1=CTCSS, 2=DCS normal, 3=DCS inverted The remaining least significant 12bit encode the frequency in 0.1Hz or the DCS code in binary.

meta.name: Transmit Contact Index
meta.brief: Specifies the index without any offset.

meta.name: Group List Index
meta.brief: Specifies the group list index +1. If set to 0, none is selected.

meta.name: DMR encryption key index.
meta.brief: Specifies the index +1. If set to 0, no key is selected.

meta.name: Mute code
meta.brief: 6 digit BCD

meta.name: Second Settings Block
meta.brief: Corresponds to the segment index 2.

meta.name: Active VFO
meta.brief: Specifies which VFO is active.

meta.name: Enable Dual Wait
meta.brief: Enables simultaneous observation of both VFOs.

meta.name: Spectrum Center Frequency
meta.brief: Specified in multiple of 10Hz.

meta.name: Spectrum Frequency Step
meta.brief: Specified in Hz.

meta.name: Spectrum Threshold
meta.brief: In -dBm?

meta.name: VFO A Zone Index
meta.brief: 0-base index.

meta.name: VFO B Zone Index
meta.brief: 0-base index.

meta.name: Quick Key Settings
meta.brief: For every number key, 0, 1, ..., 9.

meta.name: Zone Bank
meta.brief: Corresponds to the segment index 3.

meta.name: Zones
meta.brief: Holds all 256 zones.

meta.name: Default Channel Index VFO B
meta.brief: Yes, again.

meta.name: Channel index
meta.brief: If not used, set to ffffh.

meta.name: Contact bank
meta.brief: Corresponds to the segment index 4.

meta.name: Contacts
meta.brief: The first one may be fixed to all call. With number aaaaaaaah.

meta.name: DMR ID
meta.brief: Specifies the DMR ID in 8 digit BCD little endian!
meta.description: If call type is all-call, the stored number is aaaaaaaah.

meta.name: Group List Bank
meta.brief: Corresponds to the segment index 5.

meta.name: Group Call Index
meta.brief: Specifies the 0-based index of the group call. Set to ffffh, if not used.

meta.name: Encryption Keys
meta.brief: Corresponds to the segment index 6.

meta.name: Key Index (LSB)
meta.brief: Just the least signficant byte of the encryption key index + 1.
meta.description: This field is set, irrespective whether the key is valid or not.

meta.name: Key Type
meta.brief: Specifies the key type.

meta.name: Name
meta.brief: Specifies the key name.

meta.name: Key
meta.brief: Stores the key data in big endian. Depending on the key type, the key might be 64/128/256 bits large.

meta.name: Messages
meta.brief: Corresponds to the segment index 7.

meta.name: Index
meta.brief: Stores the 0-based index of the message. If set to ff, message is invalid.

meta.name: FM Broadcast Channel Bank
meta.brief: Corresponds to the segment index 8.

meta.name: Frequency
meta.brief: Specifies the frequency in multiples of 100kHz.
